title: SVBPH Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for 04 Junior Resident, Senior Resident Posts
description: The Sardar Ballabhai Patel Hospital (SVBPH) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 04 Junior Residents and Senior Residents. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their MBBS, MD/MS, DNB, Post-graduation, or Diploma can apply for the SVBPH Notification 2026. The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview.
